entry.name: a2a-agent-discovery
entry.description: Agent2Agent (A2A) Protocol is an open standard designed to facilitate communication and interoperability between independent, potentially opaque AI agent systems. This App-ID covers the agent discovery phase of A2A traffic where A2A servers present their agent cards to the clients.

entry.name: abb-cls
entry.description: ABB Central Licensing System (CLS) is a licensing mechanism where a designated node distributes the available licenses as they are needed to all other nodes within the system. This App-ID covers a license request from a node within the system to the CLS server.

entry.name: abb-iac
entry.description: ABB's Inter Application Communication (IAC) is an application layer protocol, used for reading and writing variables between controllers in the 800xA network.

entry.name: abb-rnrp
entry.description: ABB's Redundant Network Routing Protocol (RNRP) enables a network architecture with two physically separate networks. Network redundancy adds an extra instance within the network infrastructure to ensure network availability. This serves as a backup for shifting network communications onto the other network in case of a disturbance in the first one, and therefore avoiding single point of failure.

entry.name: abb-tunnel
entry.description: The ABB 800xA architecture consists of varied nodes, such as Domain Server, Connectivity Server, Application servers, Operator Stations and the Aspect Server, each fulfilling different roles. Communication between ABB controllers, workstations, and nodes can be encapsulated in an ABB tunnel.

entry.name: abilityai
entry.description: Ability AI provides AI systems for marketing and business operations including AI Agent Hub, a library of AI agents for business process automation.

entry.name: abiomed-remote-link
entry.description: Abiomed manufactures medical technology that provides circulatory and oxygenation support, like the Impella heart pump. The Automated Impella Controller (AIC) is the primary user control interface for all Impella heart pumps. A Medical Device Data System (MDDS) called the Remote Link can be used to stream video from the AIC to a monitor, displaying Impella device operating parameters and alarm messages.

entry.name: advantech-adam-ascii
entry.description: Advantech's ADAM series Ethernet I/O modules include analog I/O, digital I/O, and relay modules. With their optimized design and enhanced capabilities, the ADAM series modules provide an I/O solution that can be conveniently integrated with various Ethernet control systems. ASCII commands can be used for communication with the ADAM series modules.

entry.name: advantech-adam-webserver
entry.description: Advantech Remote I/O devices are powerful tools for industrial automation and data acquisition. These modules allow for flexible and scalable remote monitoring and control in various industrial settings. The Advantech ADAM Web Server allows for configuration and access to live data and diagnostics of its I/O devices.

entry.name: ewon-talk2m-access-client

entry.name: exor-hmi-discovery

entry.name: exor-hmi-webserver
entry.description: EXOR HMI webservers allow modern web technologies such as HTML5, SVG and Javascript and while offering the same computing speed as IPCs, offer added advantages such as temperature range, security, longevity and robustness. They are the ideal choice for all demanding IoT edge applications in factory, marine and building automation where powerful and performing HTML5 web browser is needed.

entry.name: festo-automation-suite-scan
entry.description: Festo Automation Suite Scan is a feature that automatically scans your local network for connected Festo devices. When activated, it displays a list of found devices, allowing users to perform basic actions like checking device details, updating firmware, changing network settings, or adding the device to a project.

entry.name: festo-cmmt-plug-in
entry.description: The Festo CMMT plugin is a software add-on for the Festo Automation Suite that enables the configuration, commissioning, and diagnostics of CMMT-series servo drives, such as the CMMT-ST and CMMT-AS. It provides a user-friendly interface to connect to the drive, set parameters, perform automatic setups with a wizard, and access an expert view for advanced control.

entry.name: festo-servo-drive-webserver
entry.description: A Festo Servo Drive, like the CMMT-AS model, is a high-precision electronic controller. Its main job is to take low-level commands (for position, speed, or torque) from a main controller (PLC) and provide the high power needed to run a servo motor accurately using a closed-loop feedback system. The Festo Automation Suite is an integrated software platform designed for configuring, commissioning, and maintaining Festo automation products. It allows users to connect to Festo devices for tasks such as diagnostics, firmware updates, and parameterization.

entry.name: gost
entry.description: GOST (GO Simple Tunnel) is an open-source network tunneling and proxy tool written in Go that supports multiple protocols like HTTP, SOCKS, and Shadowsocks. It's used to securely forward or relay network traffic through customizable proxy chains.

entry.name: gotohttp
entry.description: GotoHTTP is a cross-platform remote control software that supports unattended access, file transfer, clipboard transfer and Wake-on-LAN. This App-ID covers the traffic of GotoHTTP.

entry.name: guardtime-federal-ksi
entry.description: Guardtime Federal's Keyless Signature Infrastructure (KSI) is a technology designed to provide immutable, real-time proof of the integrity of digital assets. Unlike traditional security methods that rely on public key infrastructure (PKI) and centralized trusted authorities, KSI uses a distributed blockchain and cryptographic hash functions.

entry.name: guldmann-clm-hoist
entry.description: Guldmann Care Lift Management (CLM) ceiling hoist is often the ideal and most effective way to lift and move people. The Guldmann lifting module is intended for lifting and transferring a user with disabilities and for gait training. This App-ID covers communication from a Guldmann CLM ceiling hoist to a CLM data server.

entry.name: gvcp
entry.description: GigE Vision Control Protocol (GVCP) is a video interface standard that defines how to control and configure devices as well as specifying stream channels and the mechanisms of sending image and configuration data between cameras and computers.

entry.name: hakko-vsft-screen-data-transfer
entry.description: Hakko V-SFT configuration software is used for programming and configuring Monitouch HMI (Human-Machine Interface) devices. This software provides enhanced operability and convenient screen configuration tools, allowing for easy viewing of HMI displays, graphic indication of system configuration, and improved search functionality. Additionally, the Hakko V-SFT software tool can be used to transfer screen data to the Monitouch HMI.

entry.name: hakko-vsft-simulator
entry.description: Hakko V-SFT configuration software is used for programming and configuring Monitouch HMI (Human-Machine Interface) devices. This software provides enhanced operability and convenient screen configuration tools, allowing for easy viewing of HMI displays, graphic indication of system configuration, and improved search functionality. The simulator function of the V-SFT software allows users to perform operation checks on a newly created screen without the HMI or PLC.

entry.name: hightail-copy
entry.description: Hightail - formerly YouSendIt - is a cloud service developed and hosted by YouSendIt Inc. that lets users send, receive, digitally sign and synchronize files. It had an early focus on helping users send files that were too large for email, but started adding features and plug-ins for businesses in 2007. The service can be used via the web, a desktop client, mobile devices, or from within business applications with a Hightail plugin.

entry.name: modbus-diagnostics
entry.description: Modbus is a serial communications protocol published by Modicon in 1979 for use with its programmable logic controllers (PLCs). It has become a de facto standard communications protocol in industry, and is now the most commonly available means of connecting industrial electronic devices. The Modbus protocol is typically used in Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) and Industrial Control System (ICS) applications.

entry.name: ntcip-ftp
entry.description: National Transportation Communications for Intelligent Transportation System (ITS) Protocol (NTCIP) is a family of standards that provides both the rules for communicating (called protocols) and the vocabulary (called objects) necessary to allow electronic traffic control equipment from different manufacturers to operate with each other as a system. One such communication protocol leveraged by NTCIP is FTP (File Transfer Protocol).

entry.name: ntcip-sfmp
entry.description: National Transportation Communications for Intelligent Transportation System (ITS) Protocol (NTCIP) is a family of standards that provides both the rules for communicating (called protocols) and the vocabulary (called objects) necessary to allow electronic traffic control equipment from different manufacturers to operate with each other as a system. One such communication protocol leveraged by NTCIP is SFMP (Simple Fixed Message Protocol).

entry.name: ntcip-snmp

One such communication protocol leveraged by NTCIP is SNMP (Simple Network Management Protocol).

One such communication protocol leveraged by NTCIP is SNMP-TRAP (Simple Network Management Protocol TRAP notification).

One such communication protocol leveraged by NTCIP is STMP (Simple Transportation Management Protocol).

entry.name: sick-sopas-cola-b

This App-ID covers SICK SOPAS Cola B traffic.

entry.name: snmpv1-get-next-request
entry.description: Simple Network Management Protocol (SNMP) is an Internet-standard protocol for managing devices on IP networks. Devices that typically support SNMP include routers, switches, servers, workstations, printers, modem racks, and more. It is used mostly in network management systems to monitor network-attached devices for conditions that warrant administrative attention. This App-ID covers the GetNextRequest traffic of SNMP Version 1.

entry.name: yaskawa-drivewizard-net-scan
entry.description: The Yaskawa DriveWizard Industrial support tool is a Windows-based PC program designed to make commissioning and troubleshooting of Yaskawa drives as simple as possible. DriveWizard Industrial provides user-friendly tools for viewing, manipulating, and exchanging data with the drive. Data can be retrieved, changed, stored, and graphed.

entry.name: yokogawa-fast-tools-hse
entry.description: Yokogawa FAST/TOOLS is a real-time information management and visualization software environment that can be utilized to monitor main production facilities such as petrochemical complexes and power plants, as well as sub-processes such as utilities, reactors, tank farms, and loading and offloading facilities.

entry.name: zendesk-ai-post
entry.description: Zendesk is a web-based help desk software with a support ticket system. Zendesk AI refers to the suite of artificial intelligence tools and capabilities integrated into Zendesk's customer service platform.

entry.name: zoll-server
entry.description: Zoll Server asset management software helps you stay on top of defibrillator maintenance across multiple devices and campuses. It centralizes information from all connected devices in one secure location, saving time and helping your team ensure defibrillators are ready the moment they are needed. Its cloud-based format allows you to access it from anywhere, anytime, securely. This App-ID covers communication from a Zoll defibrillator to a Zoll dashboard on a Zoll server.

entry.name: zoom-delete
entry.description: Zoom is a meeting platform that unifies HD video conferencing, mobility and web meetings into a cloud service. This App-ID covers traffic of deleting recordings.

entry.name: zoom-record
entry.description: Zoom is a meeting platform that unifies HD video conferencing, mobility and web meetings into a cloud service. This App-ID covers traffic of when a meeting is being recorded.
